definitions.text: i filosofi: det å slutte fra en rekke enkelttilfeller til det allmenne
definitions.translation: reasoning from a series of individual cases to the general

definitions.text: i fysikk: det å få fram elektrisk strøm i en leder ved å endre magnetfeltet rundt
definitions.translation: generation of electric current in a conductor by changing the magnetic field around it

definitions.text: i biologi: det at visse celler eller stoffer, særlig under fosterutviklingen, utløser en bestemt vekst hos visse andre celler eller gjør at visse andre stoffer dannes
definitions.translation: in biology: the process by which certain cells or substances, during embryonic development, trigger a specific growth in certain other cells or cause certain other substances to form

definitions.text: i medisin: det å framkalle eller stimulere til en ønsket respons
definitions.translation: in medicine: the process of inducing or stimulating a desired response
